prompt: Trace the early history of the Canal Boat Register in Westmere. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Verify only the original location; do not research the current address or speculate about why the collection moved.

fetch_primary.title: Canal Boat Register accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Canal Boat Register began in the lock keeper's cottage at 2 Basin Row. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.

fetch_alternate.title: Alternate official record for Canal Boat Register
fetch_alternate.content: The archived founding memorandum states that the Canal Boat Register was first housed in the lock keeper's cottage at 2 Basin Row.
